stonetop.summary: Faceless stone mannequin-servants grinding through their last orders forever.

system.concept: Faceless stone mannequin-servants grinding through their last orders forever.
system.description: Imagine one of those artists' mannequins, but full-sized and made of polished rock: two fingers and a thumb on each hand, faceless, expressionless, making a stone-on-stone grinding noise as they move. They're most often found inert and covered in dust, waiting for an energy source — a Stone Lord's song or a thrumming power-crystal — to give them 'life,' whereupon they follow any orders given in the Stone Lord's tongue. A few are still active, powered by inexhaustible sources, their joints worn smooth and their hands ground to nubs, some crawling on broken limbs at tasks that will never end.
